calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Disposition Of The Reserve

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Disposition Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Continued To Dec-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Preliminary Distribution; For Partial Allowance Of Statutory Attorney'S And Administrator'S Compensation; Report Of Status Of Administration And Petition For Approval Thereof; And Request For Extension Of Time To Administer Estate
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Janet Boessenecker appeared via zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator (administrator).

Ms. Boessenecker stated that she would like to have a partial statutory attorney's and administrators' compensation, and that a partial distribution to the beneficiaries in the amount of $2,000,000.00. Petition for preliminary distribution etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Yang. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Oct-27-1999 is admitted to probate. The San Francisco Public Administrator is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-01-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Continued To Jul-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
